name: Scattered
overview: It's the day after Wil's funeral and his three best friends have woken up with brutal hangovers and one less person — Wil — well his ashes that is. Over the series, Jules, Sami and Bo retrace their steps to find their friend's ashes and give him the send off he deserved.

trailers.title: Drag King in LGBT Series - Scattered - Behind the Scenes
